title: Justin Herbert Says Girlfriend Madison Beer ‘Changed My Life Forever’ in Sweet Birthday Post
summary: The football player added that the singer is his "favorite person of all time."
body: Madison Beer has a sweet new message from her boyfriend, Los Angeles Chargers quarterback Justin Herbert, to keep in her locket. On Thursday, the football player shared an adorable black-and-white photo of himself and his girlfriend — who just turned 27 — embracing on the sidelines, writing on his Instagram Story, “Happy birthday to my favorite person of all time.” Related A Timeline of Madison Beer and Justin Herbert’s Relationship 15 Musicians Who Have Had Romances With Pro Athletes, From Taylor Swift to Megan Thee Stallion Madison Beer’s ‘Locket’ Makes Top 10 Debut on 5 Billboard Album Charts “I love you so much,” he continued. “You’ve changed my life forever.” Herbert went on to share another snap of himself and Beer cozied up together and gushed, “I am the luckiest guy alive.” Also on her birthday, the New York native shared photos of herself posing with an “It’s My Birthday” badge, earning comments from friends such as Hailey Bieber — who wrote, “Birthday angel” — and, of course, Herbert. “My love,” he wrote in the replies.
